chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Followers of Different Religions

text: 5727 - وَ رَوَى عَاصِمُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ : "لاَ يَرِثُ اَلْيَهُودِيُّ وَ اَلنَّصْرَانِيُّ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ يَرِثُ اَلْمُسْلِمُونَ اَلْيَهُودِيَّ وَ اَلنَّصْرَانِيَّ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5727 - Asim ibn Humaid narrated from Muhammad ibn Qays who said:
I heard Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) say: "A Jew and a Christian do not inherit from Muslims, but Muslims inherit from Jews and Christians."
